privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected features via setup_task.sh. The 'Sensor Node' features are correctly inserted, with the central node precisely located at lat -35.20 and lon 149.13. The expected target notes for the center node are 'Master Hub', while the peripheral nodes should remain 'Unassigned', exactly matching the logic in setup_task.sh and verifier.py.
